name: GeneDx Holdings Corp.
summary: GeneDx Holdings Corp. is a genomics company offering exome and genome sequencing tests, primarily ExomeDx and GenomeDx, for diagnosing rare and ultra-rare genetic pediatric disorders. Founded in 2000, the company leverages its proprietary GeneDx Infinity dataset (over 2.5 million tests, 1 million exomes/genomes) and AI-powered interpretation pipelines to deliver fast, accurate genetic diagnoses. It also provides biopharma data services and genomic newborn screening, supported by over 100 MDs/PhDs and 150 genetic counselors.

products.name: ExomeDx
products.description: Exome sequencing test for rare disease diagnosis, ranked #1 by expert geneticists and granted FDA Breakthrough Device Designation.

products.name: GenomeDx
products.description: Genome sequencing test for rare disease diagnosis, ranked #1 by expert geneticists and granted FDA Breakthrough Device Designation.

products.name: GeneDx Infinity
products.description: Proprietary rare disease dataset of over 2.5 million tests including 1 million exomes/genomes with 8 million+ phenotypic datapoints.

products.name: Multiscore
products.description: Machine learning-powered gene ranker applied to GeneDx Infinity to improve speed, scale, and variant interpretation.

products.name: Rapid and ultraRapid Genomes
products.description: High-speed genome sequencing products for time-critical clinical situations.

products.name: Genomic Newborn Screening
products.description: Newborn screening protocols using a whole genome backbone for early genetic diagnosis.

partnerships.description: Acquired May 5, 2025; focused on AI-based genomic interpretation capabilities.
